canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَغۡرِبَ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَجَدَهَا تَغۡرُبُ فِي عَيۡنٍ حَمِئَةٖ وَوَجَدَ عِندَهَا قَوۡمٗاۖ قُلۡنَا يَٰذَا ٱلۡقَرۡنَيۡنِ إِمَّآ أَن تُعَذِّبَ وَإِمَّآ أَن تَتَّخِذَ فِيهِمۡ حُسۡنٗا
canonical_variants.english: So he pursued a certain course until, when he had reached the setting of the sun, he found it setting in a murky spring, and found a people in its vicinity.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَمَّا مَن ظَلَمَ فَسَوْفَ نُعَذِّبُهُۥ ثُمَّ يُرَدُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ فَيُعَذِّبُهُۥ عَذَابًۭا نُّكْرًۭا
verses.text: He said, “As for the one who does evil, we shall punish him. Then he will be returned to his Lord, and He will punish him (with) a terrible punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحًۭا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءً ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنْ أَمْرِنَا يُسْرًۭا
verses.text: But as for the one who believes, and does righteousness, for him (there is) the good payment, and we shall speak to him something easy from our command.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ اُ۬لۡحُسۡنۭيٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ  اُ۬لۡحُسۡنۭيٰۖ وَسَنَقُول لَّهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءً ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: But as for the one who has attained faith and has acted righteously, then for him is the excellent (reward) as repayment, and we will speak to him with ease regarding our command.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحاٗ فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ اُ۬لْحُسْنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنْ أَمْرِنَا يُسْراٗۖ
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنَ اٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحاٗ فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ اُ۬لْحُسْن۪ىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنَ اَمْرِنَا يُسْراٗۖ
canonical_variants.english: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
verses.text: Then he followed (another) way of access

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَطْلِعَ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَجَدَهَا تَطْلُعُ عَلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ لَّمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُم مِّن دُونِهَا سِتْرًۭا
verses.text: until, when he reached the rising (place) of the sun, he found it rising on a people for whom We had not provided any shelter from it.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَقَدْ أَحَطْنَا بِمَا لَدَيْهِ خُبْرًۭا
verses.text: So (it was), but We had already encompassed what his situation was in (our) awareness.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
verses.text: Then he followed (another) way of access

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ بَيْنَ ٱلسَّدَّيْنِ وَجَدَ مِن دُونِهِمَا قَوْمًۭا لَّا يَكَادُونَ يَفْقَهُونَ قَوْلًۭا
verses.text: until, when he arrived (at the place) between the two barriers, he found on this side of them a people hardly able to understand (his) speech.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰذَا ٱلْقَرْنَيْنِ إِنَّ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ مُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَهَلْ نَجْعَلُ لَكَ خَرْجًا عَلَىٰٓ أَن تَجْعَلَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُمْ سَدًّۭا
verses.text: They said, “Dhū-l-Qarnayn! Surely Yajūj and Majūj are fomenting corruption on the earth. Shall we pay tribute to you on (the condition) that you construct a barrier between us and them?”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّى فِيهِ رَبِّى خَيْرٌۭ فَأَعِينُونِى بِقُوَّةٍ أَجْعَلْ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُمْ رَدْمًا
verses.text: He said, “What my Lord has established me with is better. Help me with a force, (and) I shall construct a rampart between you and them.

verses.quran_arabic: ءَاتُونِى زُبَرَ ٱلْحَدِيدِ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا سَاوَىٰ بَيْنَ ٱلصَّدَفَيْنِ قَالَ ٱنفُخُوا۟ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَعَلَهُۥ نَارًۭا قَالَ ءَاتُونِىٓ أُفْرِغْ عَلَيْهِ قِطْرًۭا
verses.text: Bring me blocks of iron!” – Until, when he had made level (the gap) between the two cliffs, he said, “Blow!” – Until, when he had made it a fire, he said, “Bring me (blocks of brass)! I will pour molten brass over it.”

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَا ٱسْطَٰعُوٓا۟ أَن يَظْهَرُوهُ وَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ لَهُۥ نَقْبًۭا
verses.text: So they were not able to surmount it, nor were they able (to make) a hole in it.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هَٰذَا رَحْمَةٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى جَعَلَهُۥ دَكَّآءَ ۖ وَكَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى حَقًّۭا
verses.text: He said, “This is a mercy from my Lord. But when the promise of my Lord comes, He will shatter it. The promise of my Lord is true.”’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَتَرَكْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَمُوجُ فِى بَعْضٍۢ ۖ وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَجَمَعْنَٰهُمْ جَمْعًۭا
verses.text: We shall leave some of them on that Day crashing into each other, and there will be a blast on the trumpet, and We shall gather them all together.

verses.quran_arabic: وَعَرَضْنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَرْضًا
verses.text: We shall present Gehenna on that Day to the disbelievers,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَانَتْ أَعْيُنُهُمْ فِى غِطَآءٍ عَن ذِكْرِى وَكَانُوا۟ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَمْعًا
verses.text: whose eyes were covered from My remembrance and (who) were not capable (of) hearing.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَحَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَن يَتَّخِذُوا۟ عِبَادِى مِن دُونِىٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۚ إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلْكَٰفِرِينَ نُزُلًۭا
verses.text: Do those who disbelieve think that they can take My servants as allies instead of Me? Surely We have prepared Gehenna as a reception for the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَٰلًا
verses.text: Say: ‘Shall We inform you about the worst losers in (regard to their) deeds?

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعْيُهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يُحْسِنُونَ صُنْعًا
verses.text: (They are) those whose striving goes astray in this present life, even though they think that they are doing good in (regard to their) work.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَآئِهِۦ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَٰلُهُمْ فَلَا نُقِيمُ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ وَزْنًۭا
verses.text: Those – (they are) those who disbelieve in the signs of their Lord and in the meeting with Him. So their deeds have come to nothing. We shall not assign any weight to them on the Day of Resurrection.

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُوا۟ وَٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ ءَايَٰتِى وَرُسُلِى هُزُوًا
verses.text: That is their payment – Gehenna – because they disbelieved and took My signs and My messengers in mockery.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتُ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا
verses.text: (But) surely those who believe and do righteous deeds – for them (there will be) Gardens of Paradise as a reception,

verses.quran_arabic: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبْغُونَ عَنْهَا حِوَلًۭا
verses.text: there to remain. They will not desire any removal from there.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لَّوْ كَانَ ٱلْبَحْرُ مِدَادًۭا لِّكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّى لَنَفِدَ ٱلْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَٰتُ رَبِّى وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِۦ مَدَدًۭا
verses.text: Say: ‘If the sea were ink for the words of my Lord, the sea would indeed give out before the words of my Lord would give out, even if We brought (another sea) like it as an extension.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌۭ وَٰحِدٌۭ ۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ لِقَآءَ رَبِّهِۦ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلًۭا صَٰلِحًۭا وَلَا يُشْرِكْ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ أَحَدًۢا
verses.text: Say: ‘I am only a human being like you. I am inspired that your God is one God. So whoever expects the meeting with his Lord, let him do righteous deeds and not associate anyone in the service of his Lord.’
